expectations.text: Asks 2-3 sharp scoping questions before writing the statement
expectations.evidence: Delivers a finished 'Primary positioning statement' first; questions come only afterward.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the narrow audience and at least one targets the differentiator or main alternative
expectations.evidence: Does include audience/differentiator/competitor questions (but after the statement).

expectations.text: Does NOT deliver a finished positioning statement built on guessed inputs in this turn
expectations.evidence: Outputs a finished positioning statement built on guessed audience/category/differentiation in this turn.

expectations.text: Questions are concise — not an open-ended interrogation
